subject: refactor(cleanup): remove entire legacy budget-first system
body:
Delete all deprecated types, broken views, and old engines from the
pre-pivot budget-first system. The legacy Expense/Actual/CategoryMapping
types were tagged @deprecated but still imported by 21 files — 11 of
which were querying database tables that were already dropped in the v6
schema migration. Instead of adding more band-aids, remove them entirely.

Deleted: projection.ts, variance.ts, matching.ts, exportImport.ts,
csvParser.ts (+ all tests), ExpensesTab, ProjectedTab, CompareTab,
ExpenseCreate/EditView, ExpenseForm, ImportWizardView, all import-steps,
all compare-views, CashflowChart.

Updated WorkspaceDetailView and WorkspaceListView to use new tables
(transactions, patterns, importBatches). Updated TutorialModal for
actuals-first paradigm.

69 tests pass, build clean, type-check clean.

Tags: cleanup, legacy, types, views, engines, db
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: actuals-first-pivot
Semver: major
